headline: What CBRE Group (CBRE)'s New Chief Technology and Transformation Officer Means For Shareholders
summary: CBRE Group, Inc. has appointed Anuj Kadyan, a senior partner at McKinsey & Company, as its Chief Technology & Transformation Officer, bringing 17 years of global experience in AI, cloud, and large-scale technology transformations to the firm as of May 15, 2026. This hire signals CBRE’s intent to deepen its technology capabilities and transformation agenda, aiming to sharpen product differentiation and improve how the business is run. Next, we will examine how Kadyan’s technology and AI...

headline: A Look At CBRE Group’s (CBRE) Valuation As Shares Trade Below Estimated Fair Value
summary: CBRE Group overview and recent share performance CBRE Group (CBRE) has drawn fresh investor attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing mixed returns over different periods, including a 1 day gain alongside weaker month and past 3 months performance. See our latest analysis for CBRE Group.
